name: evals-mcp-server
description: Author verifiable eval records through a draft → review → revise → submit loop with server-enforced graders; compile to JSONL/CSV/Inspect/lm-eval.

interface.shortDescription: Author verifiable eval records with server-enforced graders.
interface.longDescription: An authoring-loop MCP server that turns an agent into an eval author. Drafts carry their own executable grader; a draft → review → surgical-revise → submit loop, with a subagent verification step and a server-side committability gate (the gold must pass its grader and a negative case must be rejected), admits only self-consistent, independently verified records. Submitted records compile to JSONL, CSV, Inspect AI, and lm-evaluation-harness formats.
